relation_text: m0* obtained from carrier density, temperature, Fermi integrals, and delta=k0T/epsilon_g
notes: Requires epsilon_g input and thermomagnetic interpretation
At K=0 gives the theoretical band-edge mass; uses |epsilon_g| and therefore does not determine the gap sign

domain: Hg1-xCdxTe; paper applies at 300 K over 0<=x<=0.2
notes: All Table 1 epsilon_g values are rounded evaluations of this relation
Temperature dependence of Ep is assumed absent
